intro.title: About me
intro.text: Hi! I'm Alan, better known online as wakku or Walker, I'm someone passionate about music, art, design and animation. I like trying new things.

likes: Being direct, honest and respectful when contacting me
Being clear about the reason for contact and what is expected
Respecting my time and personal space
Being kind and considerate in communication
Respecting my boundaries and not persisting without a valid reason
dislikes: Just saying 'hi' or 'are you available?' without any context
Talking to me without any reason
Lack of respect or unclear communication
Invading my personal space without a valid reason

cta.title: Interested in Working Together?
cta.description: Whether you have a commission request or just want to chat about creative projects, feel free to reach out!
